task.title: Task Parameters
task.subtitle: Configure a sourcing task and start AI analysis
task.marketHint: This version currently supports AmazonUS only. More marketplaces can be added later.
task.backendNotice: This workspace now uses the real backend contract. Candidates and reports come directly from the Spring backend.
task.modeNotice: Hackathon demo mode is active: the app simulates live retrieval first, then falls back to historical database snapshots when needed.
task.mockNotice: Results are currently powered by the local Mock API and can later switch to a real backend.
task.fallbackNotice: The simulated live chain switched to the database fallback path, and the agent report flow is continuing normally.

logs.title: Thinking Log
logs.empty: Waiting for a task to start...
logs.trend_rank: Ranking hot products by sales, growth and engagement
logs.candidate_ready: {count} overseas product candidates are ready for selection
logs.domestic_match: Matching domestic suppliers and source listings for {title}
logs.profit_compare: Comparing overseas price and domestic sourcing cost for {title}
logs.pricing: Estimating platform fees, FX and margin
logs.completed: Analysis completed. Review candidates and reports.
logs.analysis_failed: Secondary analysis for {title} failed. Please retry.

products.title: Hot Product Candidates
products.subtitle: Step 1: discover overseas winners, then choose one item for secondary analysis.
products.emptyDescription: Create a task first. Candidate products will appear once analysis completes.
products.stepDiscoverDescription: Scan overseas marketplaces and shortlist products with stronger sales, growth and heat.
products.stepSelectDescription: Choose a candidate to trigger domestic supplier matching and cost comparison.
products.stepReportDescription: The system will convert overseas pricing and domestic sourcing into a structured arbitrage report.
products.stepReportLoading: Comparing domestic sources, margin potential and risks now.
products.selectionHint: Select one hot product to start domestic comparison and spread analysis.
products.selectionReady: Choose a candidate to generate the final arbitrage report.
products.selectedDescriptionLoading: {title} is being compared against domestic sourcing now. The report will refresh on the right.
products.selectedDescriptionReady: {title} has finished analysis. You can switch to another product to compare more outcomes.
products.selectedTaskHint: {title} is currently selected. Starting a new task will reset the report flow on the right.

report.title: Arbitrage Report
report.emptyDescription: Choose one overseas hot product from the middle panel, then we will compare domestic sourcing data and render the report here.
report.loadingDescription: We are comparing domestic sourcing, logistics, platform fees and risks for {title}.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage demo mode, locale and default parameters

insights.data-backed: This conclusion is based on query rewriting, domestic matching, and historical detail snapshots.
insights.high-profit: This product shows strong price spread and works well as the hero case in the demo.
insights.balanced: This product sits in a manageable profit and risk range for a standard opportunity sample.
insights.high-risk: This product carries strong competition and infringement risks, making it useful for risk-control demos.

riskNotes.review_sample_size: Keep tracking review volume and refund signals
riskNotes.delivery_margin_buffer: Maintain shipping margin buffer for volatility
riskNotes.brand_check_required: A brand and infringement review is still required before launch

recommendation.test_small_batch: Start with a small validation batch
recommendation.monitor_reviews: Monitor review shifts and complaint clusters after launch
recommendation.validate_supplier: Confirm lead time and restocking capacity with the supplier
